name: Doug Stafford
subject: This week is vital
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,

We are just shy of a week away from the Iowa
Caucus.
You can bet these next few weeks will be an
all-out sprint, and let me tell you: We're going all of the way.
We're prepared and ready to fight it out
every day.
And with good reason. We are in far better
shape than the mainstream media would allow you to believe.
We've set up an excellent ground game plan in
Iowa and New Hampshire and with your help we'll have the ability
to keep it running and be in a position to win.
Can you contribute $25 today to help us keep
up the hard work in Iowa and New Hampshire this week?
I believe that we will win Iowa and beyond.
WE CAN DO IT.
But this week is crucial. It's vital we have
a strong week of events, media coverage, and voter outreach.
Rand has been hitting the ground hard and
speaking to packed crowds in overflowing rooms in early primary
states, bringing his positive message of liberty straight to the
voters.
By donating today, you can help elevate Rand
and his message so that voters can see what a real champion of
liberty looks like.
Rand will be fighting every day to show the
voters why he should be the next President.
Let's make sure we have his back at this most
crucial time. Please chip in now.

In liberty,
Doug Stafford
Chief Political Strategist

$25 MONEYBOMB >>

$50 MONEYBOMB >>

$75 MONEYBOMB >>

$100 MONEYBOMB >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Secure the Senate
subject: Anti-choicers on the Supreme Court?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7491377228647759872/-5605552170960158720?refcode=e20160124&refcode2=e20160124nd&amount=5)
---
Friend --
This is serious. The next Congress may confirm up to 3 Supreme Court justices, and anti-choice Republicans are already at the gate, working every minute to devise new, devious ways of denying women their constitutional right to choose. We need Katie in Washington joining a new Democratic majority that will protect women's constitutional freedoms. [**Can you chip in $5 to make sure Katie has the resources she needs to win this election and stand up for women?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7491377228647759872/-5533494576922230784?refcode=e20160124&refcode2=e20160124nd&amount=5) Republican Pat Toomey has voted for a federal 20-week abortion ban, for shutting down Planned Parenthood, and against eliminating a ban on U.S. servicewomen getting abortions in overseas military hospitals. So when it comes to confirming as many as three Supreme Court justices, you can bet Pat Toomey's future votes will be exactly like his past ones - against women's health, against women's rights, and against women's lives. **Pat Toomey has more than $10 million in the bank, and if we don 't keep pace with his fundraising, his anti-choice friends will bankroll his dangerous policies all the way to victory on Election Day.** [**We need your help now more than ever. Chip in $5 to make sure we can send Katie to Washington to join a Democratic Senate majority that will stand up for women.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7491377228647759872/-5533494576922230784?refcode=e20160124&refcode2=e20160124nd&amount=5) \- Secure the Senate
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7491377228647759872/-5605552170960158720?refcode=e20160124&refcode2=e20160124nd&amount=5)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7491377228647759872/-5677609764998086656).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Matt Beynon
subject: Fwd: Win a free trip to the Debate!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| _Friend,

Did you get my Boss' email?_ He's offering loyal supporters like you the opportunity to join our team at the big FOX News GOP presidential debate in Des Moines.

_**This is the last debate before the Iowa Caucus.**_ I was Senator Santorum's press secretary in 2012 when he came from the back of the pack to win the Iowa Caucus. I saw his support grow from small town hall meetings of 1 or 2 Iowans to large house parties and rallies. We saw the momentum before any of the establishment or mainstream media paid any attention to him. **Guess what? That's exactly what's happening again!** Just last week Senator Santorum hosted a tele-town hall meeting with over 10,000 Iowans. You're not going to read about that in the New York Times or see it on CNN, but the momentum is real and he would love you to be a part of it! _On February 1st, Senator Santorum is going to make history and shock the world!_
[Sign up and be a part of history with him!](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fiowa-debate%3Fsc%3Dmatt&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=matt_iowa&n=1) Hope to see you in Des Moines, Matt Beynon
Senior Advisor and Communications Director

\---------- Forwarded message \----------
From: **Rick Santorum**
Date: Fri, Jan 22, 2016 at 1:55 PM
Subject: Win a free trip to the Debate!
To: Matt <matt@ricksantorum.com>

| | Matt,

You could be my VIP guest for the next presidential debate on Thursday, January 28th! I have enjoyed meeting each of the winners from these debate contests. And I’d like to, personally, make that offer again for the upcoming Fox News Debate being held on January 28th in Des Moines, Iowa. You and a friend will have VIP access and seating as my personal guests! Your flight, hotel and a pair of tickets are all on us. All you need to do is enter the sweepstakes to be eligible. There’s not much time so be sure to enter now. [****Your donation of $20.16 or more will automatically enter you win!****](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fiowa-debate%3Fsc%3Dmatt&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=matt_iowa&n=2) Matt, I hope to meet you and escort you to the _last_ Republican Presidential Debate before the Iowa Caucus! [Hurry, enter here with your support of $20.16 or more!](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fiowa-debate%3Fsc%3Dmatt&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=matt_iowa&n=3) God Bless, Rick P.S. We are announcing the winner Monday night. [If you'd like to watch it live, follow me at Rick Santorum on Facebook!

](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fricksantorum&e=9813fae90241ec00dc55f58a48aab90e&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rick_debate&n=3&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=matt_iowa&n=4) NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN THIS PROMOTION. No contribution of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances or odds of winning. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law.Void where prohibited. All applicable federal, state, and local laws and regulations apply. Please [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fiowa-debate%3Fsc%3Dmatt&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=matt_iowa&n=5) to enter by making a contribution of $20.16. Please [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/debate_contest?e=9813fae90241ec00dc55f58a48aab90e&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rick_debate&n=8&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=matt_iowa&n=6) to enter without making a contribution. You must complete and submit the online entry form during the contest period. This Promotion begins on Friday, January 22, 2016 at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Standard Time and ends on Monday, January 25, 2016 at 11:59am Eastern Standard Time (“Entry Period”). All entries must be received by11:59am Eastern Standard Time on Monday, January 25, 2016. One winner will receive the following Prize: two tickets to the Republican Presidential Primary Debate in Des Moines, Iowa on January 28, 2016; a $600 travel stipend for travel to Des Moines, Iowa for the winner and one guest, with an approximate retail value of $600; and hotel accommodations for the winner and a guest, with an approximate retail value of $250.Prize may not be substituted or exchanged and is not redeemable for cash. All federal, state, and local taxes associated with the receipt or use of any prize awarded are the sole responsibility of the winner. The Sponsor of this Promotion is Santorum For President 2016, PO Box 247 Verona, PA 15147.
---

Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you, so if you have any thoughts on anything at all, [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/contact?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=matt_iowa&n=7) and let us know. We believe that email is one of the best ways to stay in touch with our supporters, but you can [click here if you would like to unsubscribe](http://www.ricksantorum.com/unsubscribe?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=matt_iowa&n=8) from these messages.

If you’re not interested in continuing to receive email updates, there are other ways to stay involved. You can follow our campaign on [Facebook](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ffacebook.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=matt_iowa&n=9), [Twitter](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=matt_iowa&n=10), or [Instagram](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Finstagram.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=matt_iowa&n=11).

**Thank you so much for everything you’re doing to help us reclaim the American Dream for hardworking families.**

Santorum for President 2016, PO Box 238, Verona, PA 15147

[Privacy Policy](http://www.ricksantorum.com/privacy?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=matt_iowa&n=12)

name: Ted Cruz (URGENT)
subject: My Friend Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
This is the email I didn't want to have to write. Please stop what you are doing right now -- and give me just a minute to explain.
| BREAKING: MY FRIEND DONALD TRUMP IS ATTACKING AND MISLEADING VOTERS

_[Help me set the record straight.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33082596:W6I-0qyNu:m:1:1104269936:622D9A12D06E85786CB3C70955828E97:r)_

---
| | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33082596:W6I-0qyNu:m:1:1104269936:622D9A12D06E85786CB3C70955828E97:r) |
---|---|---
---
| Friend,

This is the email I didn't want to have to write.

Please stop what you are doing right now -- and give me just a minute to explain.

[**With voting starting in just eight days, I am asking you -- one of my closest and most loyal supporters -- can I have your immediate help?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33082596:W6I-0qyNu:m:1:1104269936:622D9A12D06E85786CB3C70955828E97:r)

You see: when I first announced my campaign, Heidi and I committed that we would run an issues oriented, positive campaign.

**Unfortunately, my friend, Donald Trump, didn't make that same commitment.**

Donald -- rattled by my surge in the polls -- has decided the best way to boost his campaign and distract voters from his record is to tear me down.

If the record is not set straight, he might get away with it...and in only eight days, voting starts.

So, I need your immediate help.

**Friend, as I write this email to you, I'm still $343,750 short of my budget to win Iowa.**

That's why I'm turning to you again. Will you help me set the record straight by using one of the secure links below?

[**SET THE RECORD STRAIGHT: I will help with $5 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33082597:W6I-0qyNu:m:1:1104269936:622D9A12D06E85786CB3C70955828E97:r)

[**SET THE RECORD STRAIGHT: I will help with $35 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33082598:W6I-0qyNu:m:1:1104269936:622D9A12D06E85786CB3C70955828E97:r)

[**SET THE RECORD STRAIGHT: I will help with $50 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33082599:W6I-0qyNu:m:1:1104269936:622D9A12D06E85786CB3C70955828E97:r)

[**SET THE RECORD STRAIGHT: I will help with $250 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33082600:W6I-0qyNu:m:1:1104269936:622D9A12D06E85786CB3C70955828E97:r)

[**SET THE RECORD STRAIGHT: I will help with $500 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33082601:W6I-0qyNu:m:1:1104269936:622D9A12D06E85786CB3C70955828E97:r)

[**SET THE RECORD STRAIGHT: I will help with $2700 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33082602:W6I-0qyNu:m:1:1104269936:622D9A12D06E85786CB3C70955828E97:r)

Friend, you can make a HUGE impact on this campaign and help me win this nomination with an IMMEDIATE contribution -- no matter how small. There is great strength in numbers.

**With your personal contribution, you'll also be sending a big message to Donald Trump that _tearing others down and misleading voters is not the best way to unite conservatives and make America great again._**

Friend, I'll set the record straight on Donald's false attacks, win Iowa, and secure the Republican nomination. Together, we will reignite liberty in America.

This only happens with your help though...

_**[Heidi and I would consider it a personal favor if you would make an urgent contribution today.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/33082596:W6I-0qyNu:m:1:1104269936:622D9A12D06E85786CB3C70955828E97:r)**_

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

|

| | PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
www.tedcruz.org

---

name: Doug Stafford
subject: This is important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,

We have over 1,000 precinct captains in Iowa
and a huge 500 person leadership team in New Hampshire.
We have spoken with packed crowds in
overflowing rooms in all the early primary states.
We're on the ballot everywhere.
And the latest Fox News poll shows us in 5th
place, just one point behind 4th. We're ahead of Bush, Christie,
Kasich, and Fiorina.
With the Iowa Caucus just one week away, we
are perfectly poised to shock the nation and win.
But is that good enough for the Washington
machine?
Last time, the media kept us out of the
debate when we deserved to be in.
Will they try to silence us again for this
Thursday's debate?
We can't let them. We will not stand for it.
This is too important not to fight.
We need a strong show of support for Rand
this week to make sure everyone knows the liberty movement is
stronger than ever and rallied around Rand.
We deserve to be in the debate on Thursday.
We will win Iowa next week.
We will not be silenced.
Stand with Rand today and show your strong
support by donating $20.16.

In liberty,
Doug Stafford
Chief Political Strategist

$25 MONEYBOMB >>

$50 MONEYBOMB >>

$75 MONEYBOMB >>

$100 MONEYBOMB >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

clean_body: Dear Patriot, We have over 1,000 precinct captains in Iowa and a huge 500 person leadership team in New Hampshire. We have spoken with packed crowds in overflowing rooms in all the early primary states. We're on the ballot everywhere. And the latest Fox News poll shows us in 5th place, just one point behind 4th. We're ahead of Bush, Christie, Kasich, and Fiorina. With the Iowa Caucus just one week away, we are perfectly poised to shock the nation and win. But is that good enough for the Washington machine? Last time, the media kept us out of the debate when we deserved to be in. Will they try to silence us again for this Thursday's debate? We can't let them. We will not stand for it. This is too important not to fight. We need a strong show of support for Rand this week to make sure everyone knows the liberty movement is stronger than ever and rallied around Rand. We deserve to be in the debate on Thursday. We will win Iowa next week. We will not be silenced. Stand with Rand today and show your strong support by donating $20.16. In liberty, Doug Stafford Chief Political Strategist $25 MONEYBOMB >> $50 MONEYBOMB >> $75 MONEYBOMB >> $100 MONEYBOMB >> Or donate another amount >> Paid for by Rand Paul for President This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system April 16, 2015. For more information please follow the URL below: Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out: To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-31976845276-echo3-1F12CE1614C8EC0C1ECCFB8E481C76AE@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line. ----Powered by Paramount Communication----

Governor Christie was asked a question he's never gotten before, "Have you ever cried in office?" name: Hillary Clinton
subject: my opponent --
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
I know what this team can do. | Friend --

You don't need me to tell you that this race is close. My opponent is outspending us on TV advertising, getting in front of more voters at a crucial time -- and he's able to do that because his supporters are stepping up across the board. I know what this team is capable of, and I know we can match them.

**[So eight days before Iowa, I am asking you to step up and donate $1.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjQ1NDQ4NTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIzMjgxODUwS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

I am grateful for your commitment and resilience since this all started back in April (and for a lot of you, well before then). I know I can depend on you when it counts.

**Let me know you're fighting for me just as hard as I plan to fight for you from the Oval Office. Chip in $1 today:**
| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQ1NDQ4NTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIzMjgxODUwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjQ1NDQ4NTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIzMjgxODUwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you,

Hillary

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjQ1NDQ4NTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIzMjgxODUwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjQ1NDQ4NTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIzMjgxODUwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjQ1NDQ4NTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIzMjgxODUwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjQ1NDQ4NTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIzMjgxODUwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjQ1NDQ4NTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIzMjgxODUwS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjQ1NDQ4NTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIzMjgxODUwS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjQ1NDQ4NTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIzMjgxODUwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjQ1NDQ4NTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIzMjgxODUwS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjQ1NDQ4NTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIzMjgxODUwS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjQ1NDQ4NTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzIzMjgxODUwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
